requirement_topic.zh: 可再生能源竞价和购电协议文件
requirement_topic.zht: 可再生能源競價和購電協議文件

summary.en: Kazakhstan uses renewable-energy auctions to select RES projects, with auction schedules approved by the Ministry of Energy and project steps involving KOREM registration, auction participation, inclusion of winners, and subsequent PPA execution through the Financial Settlement Center for Renewable Energy Sources. Inverter compliance evidence may be requested as part of EPC, financing, technical, or PPA delivery packages.
summary.zh: 哈萨克斯坦通过可再生能源竞价选择RES项目，竞价时间表由能源部批准，项目步骤涉及在KOREM注册、参加竞价、纳入中标名单，并随后通过可再生能源金融结算中心签署购电协议。逆变器合规证据可能作为EPC、融资、技术或购电协议交付资料的一部分被要求。
summary.zht: 哈薩克斯坦通過可再生能源競價選擇RES項目，競價時間表由能源部批准，項目步驟涉及在KOREM註冊、參加競價、納入中標名單，並隨後通過可再生能源金融結算中心簽署購電協議。逆變器合規證據可能作為EPC、融資、技術或購電協議交付資料的一部分被要求。

standards_or_laws: Kazakhstan RES auction rules and Ministry of Energy auction schedules
Financial Settlement Center for Renewable Energy Sources auction and PPA procedures

summary.en: Chinese domestic PV project documents usually focus on local grid approval, GB/T 19964 connection evidence, equipment type-test reports, and domestic project acceptance. These do not replace Kazakhstan auction eligibility, financial security, winner registration, or PPA execution requirements.
summary.zh: 中国国内光伏项目文件通常关注当地并网批准、GB/T 19964并网证据、设备型式试验报告和国内项目验收。这些不能替代哈萨克斯坦竞价资格、保证金、中标登记或购电协议签署要求。
summary.zht: 中國國內光伏項目文件通常關注當地併網批准、GB/T 19964併網證據、設備型式試驗報告和國內項目驗收。這些不能替代哈薩克斯坦競價資格、保證金、中標登記或購電協議簽署要求。

gap.en: For auction-backed projects, inverter documentation must support the Kazakhstan project dossier, not only product import. Missing local tender/PPA evidence, grid studies, financial-security documents, or winner-registration steps can block the project even if the inverter has EAC or IEC test evidence.
gap.zh: 对于竞价支持项目，逆变器文件必须支持哈萨克斯坦项目资料包，而不仅是产品进口。即使逆变器已有EAC或IEC测试证据，缺少当地投标/购电协议证据、电网研究、保证金文件或中标登记步骤也可能阻碍项目。
gap.zht: 對於競價支持項目，逆變器文件必須支持哈薩克斯坦項目資料包，而不僅是產品進口。即使逆變器已有EAC或IEC測試證據，缺少當地投標/購電協議證據、電網研究、保證金文件或中標登記步驟也可能阻礙項目。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for projects seeking Kazakhstan RES auction support or centralized PPA route; not mandatory for every standalone inverter import
mandatory_status.cn: Project-specific under China domestic procurement and grid-connection processes

source.publisher: Financial Settlement Center for Renewable Energy Sources LLP

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Kazakhstan auction projects, product compliance and project qualification move in parallel; EAC or IEC evidence does not replace auction, PPA, financial-security, or winner-registration documents.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 对哈萨克斯坦竞价项目，产品合规和项目资格并行推进；EAC或IEC证据不能替代竞价、购电协议、保证金或中标登记文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 對哈薩克斯坦競價項目，產品合規和項目資格並行推進；EAC或IEC證據不能替代競價、購電協議、保證金或中標登記文件。
